case_title: JENNINGS, CLIFFORD et al vs. CUMMINS, KRISTINE et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JENNINGS, CLIFFORD SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-27-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JAN-03-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS HELD IN DEPT 8 ON DEC. 27, 1993. ATTY JONI LEVENTIS, REPRESENTING PLAINTIFF, CLIFFORD JENNINGS, AND JORGE HUTCHINSON, PRO PER MET WITH REFEREE BARBARA MATTHEWS. A TENTATIVE AGREEMENT WAS REACHED AND MADE PART OF THE FILE. DEFENDANT, JORGE HUTCHINSON IS TO FILE A MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUTCHINSON, JORGE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 307 PAGE ST, #3, S.F. $4,700.00 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,775.00, LEASE FORFEITED
